targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ds.total_items),0) AS [Year Parcels]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE DATEADD(HOUR, 2, ds.ts_datetime) >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE())),1,1)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})

SELECT CAST(COALESCE(100.0*SUM(ds.good_read)/NULLIF(SUM(ds.total_items),0),0) AS decimal(5,1)) AS [Year Good Read %]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE DATEADD(HOUR, 2, ds.ts_datetime) >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE())),1,1)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ds.total_items),0) AS [Month Parcels]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE DATEADD(HOUR, 2, ds.ts_datetime) >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE())),1)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})

SELECT CAST(COALESCE(100.0*SUM(ds.good_read)/NULLIF(SUM(ds.total_items),0),0) AS decimal(5,1)) AS [Month Good Read %]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE DATEADD(HOUR, 2, ds.ts_datetime) >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE())),1)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ds.total_items),0) AS [Day Parcels]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE CAST(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, ds.ts_datetime) AS date) = CAST(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE()) AS date)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})

SELECT CAST(COALESCE(100.0*SUM(ds.good_read)/NULLIF(SUM(ds.total_items),0),0) AS decimal(5,1)) AS [Day Good Read %]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE CAST(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, ds.ts_datetime) AS date) = CAST(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE()) AS date)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})
SELECT COUNT(*) AS [Total Devices] FROM dbo.devices WHERE (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})

SELECT COUNT(*) AS [Online Now]
FROM (
  SELECT x.device_id FROM (
    SELECT ds.device_id, ds.status,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ds.device_id ORDER BY ds.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_status ds
    JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
    WHERE (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})
  ) x WHERE x.rn = 1 AND x.status = 'online'
) t

WITH device_scope AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.customer, d.location, d.machine_name
  FROM dbo.devices d
  WHERE (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})
),
latest_status AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.status FROM (
    SELECT ds.device_id, ds.status,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ds.device_id ORDER BY ds.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_status ds
  ) x WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_os AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.os_version FROM (
    SELECT os.device_id, os.os_version,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY os.device_id ORDER BY os.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_os_status os
  ) x WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_c_drive AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.usage_percent FROM (
    SELECT ss.device_id, ss.usage_percent,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ss.device_id ORDER BY ss.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_storage_status ss WHERE ss.drive = 'C:'
  ) x WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_app AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.application_running FROM (
    SELECT a.device_id, a.application_running,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.device_id ORDER BY a.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_application_status a
  ) x WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_metrics AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.cpu_percent, x.mem_usage_pct, x.temp_celsius FROM (
    SELECT m.device_id, m.cpu_percent, m.mem_usage_pct, m.temp_celsius,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY m.device_id ORDER BY m.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_os_metrics m
  ) x WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_uptime AS (
  SELECT x.device_id, x.uptime_seconds FROM (
    SELECT u.device_id, u.uptime_seconds,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u.device_id ORDER BY u.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_uptime_status u
  ) x WHERE x.rn = 1
),
stats AS (
  SELECT ds.device_id,
    SUM(ds.total_items) AS total_items,
    SUM(ds.good_read)   AS good_read,
    SUM(ds.no_dimension) AS no_dimension,
    SUM(ds.no_weight)   AS no_weight
  FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
  WHERE CAST(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, ds.ts_datetime) AS date) = CAST(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE()) AS date)
  GROUP BY ds.device_id
)
SELECT
  sc.customer                                                    AS [Customer],
  sc.location                                                    AS [Location],
  sc.machine_name                                                AS [Machine],
  COALESCE(ls.status, 'unknown')                                 AS [Status],
  COALESCE(
    CASE
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.26200%' THEN 'Win 11 24H2+'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.26120%' THEN 'Win 11 24H2+'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.26100%' THEN 'Win 11 24H2'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.25398%' THEN 'Win 11 23H2'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.22631%' THEN 'Win 11 23H2'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.22621%' THEN 'Win 11 22H2'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.22000%' THEN 'Win 11 21H2'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.19045%' THEN 'Win 10 22H2'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.19044%' THEN 'Win 10 21H2'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.19043%' THEN 'Win 10 21H1'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.19042%' THEN 'Win 10 20H2'
      WHEN lo.os_version LIKE '%10.0.19041%' THEN 'Win 10 2004'
      ELSE lo.os_version
    END, 'No Data'
  )                                                              AS [OS Version],
  CAST(COALESCE(lc.usage_percent, 0) AS decimal(5,1))           AS [C: Drive %],
  COALESCE(CAST(la.application_running AS int), -1)             AS [App Running],
  CAST(COALESCE(lm.cpu_percent, 0) AS decimal(5,1))             AS [CPU %],
  CAST(COALESCE(lm.mem_usage_pct, 0) AS decimal(5,1))           AS [Mem %],
  CAST(COALESCE(lm.temp_celsius, 0) AS decimal(5,1))            AS [Temp C],
  CAST(COALESCE(lu.uptime_seconds / 3600.0, 0) AS decimal(10,1)) AS [Uptime h],
  COALESCE(st.total_items, 0)                                    AS [Items Today],
  CAST(COALESCE(100.0*st.good_read/NULLIF(st.total_items,0),0) AS decimal(5,1)) AS [Good Read %],
  CAST(COALESCE(100.0*st.no_dimension/NULLIF(st.total_items,0),0) AS decimal(5,1)) AS [No Dims %],
  CAST(COALESCE(100.0*st.no_weight/NULLIF(st.total_items,0),0) AS decimal(5,1))   AS [No Weight %]
FROM device_scope sc
LEFT JOIN latest_status  ls ON ls.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN latest_os      lo ON lo.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN latest_c_drive lc ON lc.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN latest_app     la ON la.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN latest_metrics lm ON lm.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN latest_uptime  lu ON lu.device_id = sc.id
LEFT JOIN stats          st ON st.device_id = sc.id
ORDER BY sc.customer, sc.location, sc.machine_name

SELECT
  d.machine_name AS [Machine],
  CAST(COALESCE(100.0*SUM(ds.good_read)/NULLIF(SUM(ds.total_items),0),0) AS decimal(5,1)) AS [Good Read %]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE CAST(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, ds.ts_datetime) AS date) = CAST(DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETDATE()) AS date)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})
GROUP BY d.machine_name
ORDER BY [Good Read %] ASC

panels.title: Items Processed — 30 Min Totals + 15 Min Avg per Device

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CAST(DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',ts_datetime)/30*30,'2000-01-01') AS datetime2) AS time,
  SUM(total_items) AS [Items (30 min)]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE CAST(DATEADD(HOUR,2,ds.ts_datetime) AS date) = CAST(DATEADD(HOUR,2,GETDATE()) AS date)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})
GROUP BY DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',ts_datetime)/30
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  CAST(DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',ts_datetime)/15*15,'2000-01-01') AS datetime2) AS time,
  CAST(SUM(total_items)*1.0/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ds.device_id),0) AS decimal(10,1)) AS [Avg / Device]
FROM dbo.device_statistics ds
JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = ds.device_id
WHERE CAST(DATEADD(HOUR,2,ds.ts_datetime) AS date) = CAST(DATEADD(HOUR,2,GETDATE()) AS date)
AND (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})
GROUP BY DATEDIFF(MINUTE,'2000-01-01',ts_datetime)/15
ORDER BY time

panels.title: 🔴 Offline Devices (>60 min since last packet)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  d.machine_name   AS [Device],
  d.location       AS [Location],
  d.customer       AS [Customer],
  MAX(ds.ts_datetime) AS [Last Packet],
  DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(ds.ts_datetime), GETDATE()) AS [Minutes Offline]
FROM dbo.devices d
JOIN dbo.device_statistics ds ON ds.device_id = d.id
WHERE NOT (d.machine_name = 'DIM2' AND d.location = 'JBH')
GROUP BY d.machine_name, d.location, d.customer
HAVING DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(ds.ts_datetime), GETDATE()) >= 60
ORDER BY [Minutes Offline] DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS [Apps Not Running]
FROM (
  SELECT x.device_id FROM (
    SELECT a.device_id, a.application_running,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.device_id ORDER BY a.ts_datetime DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.device_application_status a
    JOIN dbo.devices d ON d.id = a.device_id
    WHERE (${tenant:sqlstring} = '__ALL__' OR d.customer = ${tenant:sqlstring})
  ) x WHERE x.rn = 1 AND x.application_running = 0
) t

SELECT TOP 100
  dl.first_seen_utc  AS [First Seen],
  dl.source_id       AS [Source],
  dl.mqtt_topic      AS [Topic],
  dl.failure_reason  AS [Failure Reason],
  dl.retry_count     AS [Retries]
FROM dbo.telemetry_deadletter dl
ORDER BY dl.first_seen_utc DESC

list.definition:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'All' AS __text, '__ALL__' AS __value
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT customer AS __text, customer AS __value FROM dbo.devices
) v ORDER BY CASE WHEN __value='__ALL__' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, __value
list.label: Customer
list.name: tenant
list.query:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'All' AS __text, '__ALL__' AS __value
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT customer AS __text, customer AS __value FROM dbo.devices
) v ORDER BY CASE WHEN __value='__ALL__' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, __value
